before_state.reason: This source tool can build and review YouTube write plans, but it does not yet save operation-specific before-state or provider backup data before applying them.

recovery.restore_note: No built-in rollback, backups, snapshots, or provider restore are available in this runtime. Treat current YouTube write families as irreversible_and_clearly_labeled and use the saved plan and refusal output for manual follow-up only.

verification_plan.required_before_live_write: Add command-specific before-state or provider-backup support before allowing apply.
steps: Confirm no YouTube provider write or upload endpoint was called.
Confirm no OAuth login/token store, demo/job receipt, or write output was created by the write flow.
Confirm no successful write receipt was emitted.
